action.command:
python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
for fn in ['model.py','predict.py']:
    print('###', fn)
    lines=Path(fn).read_text().splitlines()
    print('num_lines', len(lines))
    for i,line in enumerate(lines,1):
        print(f'{i:03d}: {line}')
PY

num_lines 68
001: import argparse, json, os
002: from pathlib import Path
003: from PIL import Image, ImageFile
004: ImageFile.LOAD_TRUNCATED_IMAGES = True
005: 
006: import torch
007: import torch.nn as nn
008: from torch.utils.data import Dataset, DataLoader
009: from torchvision import transforms
010: from torch.cuda.amp import autocast
011: from tqdm import tqdm
012: 
013: from model import build_model
014: 
015: IMAGENET_MEAN = [0.485, 0.456, 0.406]
016: IMAGENET_STD = [0.229, 0.224, 0.225]
017: 
018: class TestDataset(Dataset):
019:     def __init__(self, root, transform):
020:         self.root = Path(root)
021:         self.paths = [ln.strip().split()[0] for ln in (self.root/'test.txt').read_text().splitlines() if ln.strip()]
022:         self.transform = transform
023:     def __len__(self): return len(self.paths)
024:     def __getitem__(self, idx):
025:         img = Image.open(self.root/'images'/self.paths[idx]).convert('RGB')
026:         return self.transform(img)
027: 
028: def main():
029:     ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
030:     ap.add_argument('--data_path', required=True)
031:     ap.add_argument('--checkpoint', required=True)
032:     ap.add_argument('--output', required=True)
033:     ap.add_argument('--batch_size', type=int, default=512)
034:     ap.add_argument('--workers', type=int, default=16)
035:     args = ap.parse_args()
036: 
037:     ckpt = torch.load(args.checkpoint, map_location='cpu')
038:     cargs = ckpt.get('args', {})
039:     backbone = cargs.get('backbone', 'vit_base_patch16_clip_224.openai')
040:     model = build_model(backbone, pretrained=False)
041:     model.load_state_dict(ckpt['model'], strict=True)
042:     device = torch.device('cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu')
043:     model.to(device).eval()
044:     if torch.cuda.device_count() > 1:
045:         model = nn.DataParallel(model)
046: 
047:     tf = transforms.Compose([
048:         transforms.Resize(256, interpolation=transforms.InterpolationMode.BICUBIC),
049:         transforms.CenterCrop(224),
050:         transforms.ToTensor(),
051:         transforms.Normalize(IMAGENET_MEAN, IMAGENET_STD),
052:     ])
053:     ds = TestDataset(args.data_path, tf)
054:     dl = DataLoader(ds, batch_size=args.batch_size, shuffle=False, num_workers=args.workers, pin_memory=True, persistent_workers=args.workers>0)
055:     preds=[]
056:     with torch.no_grad():
057:         for x in tqdm(dl, disable=True):
058:             x=x.to(device, non_blocking=True)
059:             with autocast(enabled=device.type=='cuda'):
060:                 logits=model(x)
061:             preds.extend(logits.argmax(1).detach().cpu().tolist())
062:     Path(args.output).parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
063:     with open(args.output, 'w') as f:
064:         json.dump({'predictions': [int(p) for p in preds]}, f)
065:     print(f'wrote {len(preds)} predictions')
066: 
067: if __name__ == '__main__':
068:     main()
